---
title: "PAAR: POPS"
mainfont: Special Elite
---

MISSION <br> 
**P**OSSIBLE OIL PIPE SABOTAGE

**MISSION LOCATION** <br> 
THE BLACK FOREST, GERMANY, ERA (EUROPEAN AND RUSSIAN ALLIANCE)

**MISSION STARTED - MISSION CLOSED** <br> 
1920 27 FEB 1990 - 0345 28 FEB 1990

**CLIENT - CONTRACT DATE** <br> 
TAG (THE ARROWS OF GAIA)- 16TH JAN 1990

**REMARKS** <br> 


**MERCENARIES INVOLVED - CODENAMES - STATUS** <br> 
████████████████████ - WOODEN SPARROW - ACTIVE <br>
████████████████████ - LANCED BULL - ACTIVE <br>
████████████████████ - STEAM GAZELLE - ACTIVE <br>
████████████████████ - BLINK FERRET - ACTIVE <br>


team worked for TAG and stopped the pipeline from running}
https://m-gemmell.github.io/PRIMEVAL_DEITIES/Missions/M-POPS.html
